text:
6 7 8
Sunday Su Ma Jti Me Ve Sa Mo Ra
Monday Mo Ra Su Ma Ju Me Ve Sa
Tuesday Ma Ju Me Ve Sa Mo Ra Su
Wednesday Me Ve Sa Mo Ra Su Ma Ju
Thursday Ju Me Ve Sa Mo Ra Su Ma
Friday Ve Sa Mo Ra Su Ma Ju Me
Saturday Sa Mo Ra Su Ma Ju Me Ve
This Tamil system is the current system popular throughout
India now a days for calculating Rahukala.
Kshenika Graha (Momentary influence)
Special names for Y ama
Even though the planetary lordship is ascribed to every
Yama, it is not by the name of those planets but by some
other unique names that these Yama are known. For example,
when we divide day or night in t~is manner the time span
that would be ascribed to Saturn is known as Gulika kala (the
time span ascribed to Saturn within a day or night). Or in
other words, Yama of Saturn is known as the time span of
Kshenika Graha (momentary influence) with the name Gulika.
The word Gulika Kala means time span of Gulika (Ya ma of
Saturn). Similarly the time span ascribed to various planets
